title: Blackwolf Library
description: A library for my decorative mods
body:
This is a common library for all my decorative mods. It allows me not to have duplicate code in all mods and to be faster in the development or bug fixing phase.

You will be required by the following mods starting with Minecraft version 1.20.1:

-**More Decorative Blocks - BlackWolf Design**  
-**More Buttons**  
-**More Carpets**  
-**More Beautiful Doors**  
-**More Beautiful Fences & Gates**  
-**More Beautiful Pressure Plates**  
-**More Beautiful Slabs**  
-**More Beautiful Stairs**  
-**More Beautiful Trapdoors**  
 -**More Beautiful Walls**

https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf

***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
